# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd-injected
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: linkerd-injected
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app-deployment
  namespace: linkerd-injected
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-app
          image: my-app:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-app-server
  namespace: linkerd-injected
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  port:
    number: 8080
  protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-app-authorization
  namespace: linkerd-injected
spec:
  target:
    kind: Server
    name: my-app-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: all-unauthenticated
      namespace: linkerd-injected
  client:
    kind: Identites
    name: all-identities
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: all-unauthenticated
  namespace: linkerd-injected
spec:
  description: Allow all unauthenticated access
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Identity
metadata:
  name: all-identities
  namespace: linkerd-injected
spec:
  description: Allow communication from all authenticated identities
